title: Thin People
content:
There was an old fellow named Green,
     Who grew so abnormally lean,
        And flat, and compressed,
        That his back touched his chest,
     And sideways he couldn't be seen.

     There was a young lady of Lynn,
     Who was so excessively thin,
        That when she essayed
        To drink lemonade
     She slipped through the straw and fell in.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Thin People", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
